title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers tutorial addressing hidden charges that persist after resource deletion in AWS, including RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways. Provides a step-by-step cleanup checklist and demonstrates how to set up billing alarms to prevent surprise charges.
